title: Working Like a Lawyer with Claude
summary: Mark Pike from Anthropic and Anna Gressel from Freshfields discuss how lawyers use Claude in their work. They explore how legal practice is evolving with AI tools while maintaining that final judgment and decision-making responsibility remains with the lawyer.
writeup: Mark Pike from Anthropic and Anna Gressel from Freshfields discuss how lawyers incorporate Claude into legal work. The conversation covers how legal practice is evolving with AI tools while final judgment and decision-making responsibility stays with the lawyer. The central takeaway is a human-in-the-loop framing: Claude assists, and the lawyer retains accountability for outcomes.
